name: TAG: NA ŻYWO
css: #tag-nazywo-wrap { position: absolute; right: 110px; bottom: 300px; width: 190px; height: 40px; transform: translateX(100px); opacity: 0; transition: transform 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 1), opacity 0.4s ease; z-index: 9999; } .active #tag-nazywo-wrap { transform: translateX(0); opacity: 1; } #tag-nazywo-wrap .live-tag { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 100%; height: 100%; background: linear-gradient(-45deg, #4a0404, #8b0000, #ff3333, #8b0000); background-size: 400% 400%; animation: liveGrad3 4s ease infinite; border: 2px solid #ffffff; box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.5); box-sizing: border-box; } #tag-nazywo-wrap .live-text { font-family: 'Bahnschrift', sans-serif; font-weight: bold; font-size: 25px; color: #ffffff; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; margin-top: 2px; } @keyframes liveGrad3 { 0% { background-position: 0% 50%; } 50% { background-position: 100% 50%; } 100% { background-position: 0% 50%; } }

name: TAG: POWTÓRKA
css: #tag-powtorka-wrap { position: absolute; right: 110px; bottom: 300px; width: 190px; height: 40px; transform: translateX(100px); opacity: 0; transition: transform 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 1), opacity 0.4s ease; z-index: 9999; } .active #tag-powtorka-wrap { transform: translateX(0); opacity: 1; } #tag-powtorka-wrap .live-tag { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 100%; height: 100%; background: linear-gradient(-45deg, #ffffff, #808080, #404040); background-size: 400% 400%; animation: liveGrad2 4s ease infinite; border: 2px solid #020202; box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.5); box-sizing: border-box; } #tag-powtorka-wrap .live-text { font-family: 'Bahnschrift', sans-serif; font-weight: bold; font-size: 25px; color: #ffffff; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; margin-top: 2px; } @keyframes liveGrad2 { 0% { background-position: 0% 50%; } 50% { background-position: 100% 50%; } 100% { background-position: 0% 50%; } }

name: TAG: BIAŁYSTOK
css: #tag-bialystok-wrap { position: absolute; right: 110px; bottom: 940px; width: 190px; height: 40px; transform: translateX(100px); opacity: 0; transition: transform 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 1), opacity 0.4s ease; z-index: 9999; } .active #tag-bialystok-wrap { transform: translateX(0); opacity: 1; } #tag-bialystok-wrap .live-tag { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 100%; height: 100%; background: linear-gradient(-45deg, #ffffff, #808080, #404040); background-size: 400% 400%; animation: liveGrad1 4s ease infinite; box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.5); } #tag-bialystok-wrap .live-text { font-family: 'Bahnschrift', sans-serif; font-weight: bold; font-size: 25px; color: #ffffff; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; margin-top: 2px; } @keyframes liveGrad1 { 0% { background-position: 0% 50%; } 50% { background-position: 100% 50%; } 100% { background-position: 0% 50%; } }

name: TAG: WYDANIE SPECJALNE
css: #tag-spec-wrap { position: absolute; left: 30px; bottom: 115px; width: 380px; height: 40px; transform: translateX(-100px); opacity: 0; transition: transform 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 1), opacity 0.4s ease, bottom 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); z-index: 9999; } .active #tag-spec-wrap { transform: translateX(0); opacity: 1; } #tag-spec-wrap .live-tag { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 100%; height: 100%; background: linear-gradient(-45deg, #e91e63, #f44336, #e91e63); background-size: 200% 200%; animation: specGrad 3s ease infinite; border: 2px solid #ffffff; box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.5); box-sizing: border-box; } #tag-spec-wrap .live-text { font-family: 'Bahnschrift', sans-serif; font-weight: bold; font-size: 24px; color: #ffffff; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; margin-top: 2px; } @keyframes specGrad { 0% { background-position: 0% 50%; } 50% { background-position: 100% 50%; } 100% { background-position: 0% 50%; } }

name: PASEK: WIADOMOŚCI ROTACYJNE (Wiper)
css: .news-container-v8 { position: absolute; bottom: 50px; width: 100%; height: 60px; background-color: #730000; color: white; display: flex; align-items: center; overflow: hidden; border-top: 2px solid white; border-left: 2px solid white; border-right: 2px solid white; box-sizing: border-box; font-family: 'Bahnschrift', sans-serif; transform: translateY(100px); opacity: 0; transition: transform 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 1), opacity 0.4s ease; z-index: 50; } .active .news-container-v8 { transform: translateY(0); opacity: 1; } .news-text-v8 { position: absolute; width: auto; left: 0; white-space: nowrap; text-align: left; font-size: 40px; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; padding-left: 170px; padding-right: 20px; box-sizing: border-box; z-index: 1; transition: opacity 0.4s ease-in-out; opacity: 0; } .news-text-v8.visible { opacity: 1; } .wiper-v8 { position: absolute; left: 0; width: {{f-width}}; height: {{f-height}}; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #ff0055 0%, #e30613 100%); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border-left: 3px solid white; border-right: 3px solid white; box-shadow: 5px 0 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.5); z-index: 2; box-sizing: border-box; } .wiper-text-v8 { font-weight: 900; font-size: 35px; color: white; letter-spacing: 1px; } .wiper-v8.move-right { animation: slide-right-v8 1s linear forwards; } .wiper-v8.snap-back { animation: slide-back-v8 0.5s ease-in-out forwards; } @keyframes slide-right-v8 { 0% { left: 0%; } 100% { left: calc(100% - {{f-width}}); } } @keyframes slide-back-v8 { 0% { left: calc(100% - {{f-width}}); } 100% { left: 0%; } }

name: PASEK: SCROLL (Crawl)
css: .sub-ticker-v8 { position: absolute; bottom: 0; width: 100%; height: 50px; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #dcdcdc 100%); color: #000000; display: flex; align-items: center; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: 0 -5px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); box-sizing: border-box; white-space: nowrap; font-family: 'Bahnschrift', sans-serif; transform: translateY(50px); opacity: 0; transition: transform 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 1), opacity 0.4s ease; z-index: 49; } .active .sub-ticker-v8 { transform: translateY(0); opacity: 1; } .ticker-wrap-v8 { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; animation: scroll-left-v8 40s linear infinite; } .news-item-v8 { font-size: 30px; font-weight: 400; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 0 40px; display: flex; align-items: center; } .separator-v8 { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 50px; padding: 0 25px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #7F0000 0%, #7F0000 100%); color: white; font-weight: 900; font-size: 30px; font-family: ui-monospace, 'System', monospace; border-left: 2px solid white; border-right: 2px solid white; box-shadow: 2px 0 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.3); letter-spacing: -1px; } @keyframes scroll-left-v8 { 0% { transform: translateX(0); } 100% { transform: translateX(-50%); } }

inputs.label: Wiadomości (Scroll)
inputs.default: ["KGHM MA NOWEGO PREZESA","TRUMP ZAPOWIADA KOLEJNE CŁA"]

name: BELKA: BIAŁO-SZARA
css: .lt-container { position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 1920px; height: 1080px; pointer-events: none; } .lower-third-canvas { display: block; width: 100%; height: 100%; } .text-overlay { position: absolute; left: 60px; bottom: 115px; width: 1515px; height: 170px; display: flex; align-items: center; font-family: 'Bahnschrift', sans-serif; font-size: 80px; font-weight: bold; opacity: 0; pointer-events: none; white-space: nowrap; } .text-overlay font[size="7"] { font-size: 110px !important; line-height: 1; } .text-overlay font[size="5"] { font-size: 80px !important; line-height: 1; } .text-overlay font[size="4"] { font-size: 50px !important; line-height: 1; } .text-overlay * { margin: 0; }
js: (() => { const root = {{DOM_CONTEXT}}; const canvas = root.querySelector('.lower-third-canvas'); const textEl = root.querySelector('.text-overlay'); const ctx = canvas ? canvas.getContext('2d') : null; if(canvas) { canvas.width = 1920; canvas.height = 1080; } const BAR_W = 1575, BAR_H = 170, OUTER_MARGIN = 30; const x = OUTER_MARGIN, y = 1080 - BAR_H - 115; let progress = 0, state = 'WAIT', animationId; const ease = t => t < 0.5 ? 2 * t * t : 1 - Math.pow(-2 * t + 2, 2) / 2; function animate() { if (!ctx || state === 'HIDDEN') return; ctx.clearRect(0, 0, 1920, 1080); if (state === 'IN') { progress += 0.025; if (progress >= 1) state = 'STAY'; } else if (state === 'OUT') { progress -= 0.035; if (progress <= 0) { state = 'HIDDEN'; return; } } const p = ease(Math.max(0, Math.min(1, progress))); const curW = BAR_W * p; if (curW > 0) { ctx.save(); const mainGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(x, y, x + BAR_W, y); mainGrad.addColorStop(0, "#ffffff"); mainGrad.addColorStop(0.5, "#e0e0e0"); mainGrad.addColorStop(1, "#ffffff"); ctx.fillStyle = mainGrad; ctx.fillRect(x, y, curW, BAR_H); ctx.fillStyle = "#000"; ctx.globalAlpha = 0.1; ctx.fillRect(x, y + BAR_H - 4, curW, 4); ctx.restore(); } if(textEl) { if (progress > 0.4) { textEl.style.opacity = Math.min((progress - 0.4) * 2, 1); } else { textEl.style.opacity = 0; } } animationId = requestAnimationFrame(animate); } const radar = (root.parentElement || document.body).querySelector('#tag-spec-wrap'); const isRadarActive = radar && radar.closest('.template-wrapper').classList.contains('active'); if (isRadarActive) { setTimeout(() => { if (state === 'WAIT') state = 'IN'; }, 550); } else { state = 'IN'; } animate(); new MutationObserver(() => { if(!root.classList.contains('active')) state = 'OUT'; }).observe(root, {attributes:true}); })();

name: BELKA: CZERWONA
css: .lt-container { position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 1920px; height: 1080px; pointer-events: none; z-index: 100;} .lower-third-canvas { display: block; width: 100%; height: 100%; } .text-overlay { position: absolute; left: 60px; bottom: 115px; width: 1515px; height: 170px; display: flex; align-items: center; font-family: 'Bahnschrift', sans-serif; font-size: 80px; font-weight: bold; opacity: 0; pointer-events: none; white-space: nowrap; } .text-overlay * { margin: 0; }
js: (() => { const root = {{DOM_CONTEXT}}; const canvas = root.querySelector('.lower-third-canvas'); const textEl = root.querySelector('.text-overlay'); const ctx = canvas ? canvas.getContext('2d') : null; if(canvas) { canvas.width = 1920; canvas.height = 1080; } const BAR_W = 1575, BAR_H = 170, OUTER_MARGIN = 30; const x = OUTER_MARGIN, y = 1080 - BAR_H - 115; let progress = 0, state = 'WAIT', animationId; const ease = t => t < 0.5 ? 2 * t * t : 1 - Math.pow(-2 * t + 2, 2) / 2; function animate() { if (!ctx || state === 'HIDDEN') return; ctx.clearRect(0, 0, 1920, 1080); if (state === 'IN') { progress += 0.025; if (progress >= 1) state = 'STAY'; } else if (state === 'OUT') { progress -= 0.035; if (progress <= 0) { state = 'HIDDEN'; return; } } const p = ease(Math.max(0, Math.min(1, progress))); const curW = BAR_W * p; if (curW > 0) { ctx.save(); const mainGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(x, y, x + BAR_W, y); mainGrad.addColorStop(0, "#4a0404"); mainGrad.addColorStop(0.5, "#ff0000"); mainGrad.addColorStop(1, "#4a0404"); ctx.fillStyle = mainGrad; ctx.fillRect(x, y, curW, BAR_H); ctx.fillStyle = "#000"; ctx.globalAlpha = 0.3; ctx.fillRect(x, y + BAR_H - 4, curW, 4); ctx.restore(); } if(textEl) { if (progress > 0.4) { textEl.style.opacity = Math.min((progress - 0.4) * 2, 1); } else { textEl.style.opacity = 0; } } animationId = requestAnimationFrame(animate); } const radar = (root.parentElement || document.body).querySelector('#tag-spec-wrap'); const isRadarActive = radar && radar.closest('.template-wrapper').classList.contains('active'); if (isRadarActive) { setTimeout(() => { if (state === 'WAIT') state = 'IN'; }, 550); } else { state = 'IN'; } animate(); new MutationObserver(() => { if(!root.classList.contains('active')) state = 'OUT'; }).observe(root, {attributes:true}); })();

name: BELKA: GOŚĆ
css: .lt-container { position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 1920px; height: 1080px; pointer-events: none; } .lower-third-canvas { display: block; width: 100%; height: 100%; }
js: (() => { const root = {{DOM_CONTEXT}}; const canvas = root.querySelector('.lower-third-canvas'); const ctx = canvas ? canvas.getContext('2d') : null; if(canvas) { canvas.width = 1920; canvas.height = 1080; } const font = "Bahnschrift"; const BAR_W = 1575, BAR_H = 110, SUB_W = 850, SUB_H = 60, OUTER_MARGIN = 30; const x = OUTER_MARGIN, y = 1080 - BAR_H - SUB_H - 115; let progress = 0, state = 'WAIT', animationId; const ease = t => t < 0.5 ? 2 * t * t : 1 - Math.pow(-2 * t + 2, 2) / 2; function animate() { if (!ctx || state === 'HIDDEN') return; ctx.clearRect(0, 0, 1920, 1080); if (state === 'IN') { progress += 0.025; if (progress >= 1) state = 'STAY'; } else if (state === 'OUT') { progress -= 0.035; if (progress <= 0) { state = 'HIDDEN'; return; } } const p = ease(Math.max(0, Math.min(1, progress))); if (p > 0.2) { const sp = Math.min((progress - 0.2) * 1.5, 1); ctx.save(); ctx.globalAlpha = 0.9; const subGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(x, y + BAR_H, x + SUB_W, y + BAR_H); subGrad.addColorStop(0, "#d1d1d1"); subGrad.addColorStop(1, "#f0f0f0"); ctx.fillStyle = subGrad; ctx.fillRect(x, y + BAR_H, SUB_W * ease(sp), SUB_H); if (sp > 0.5) { ctx.globalAlpha = sp; ctx.fillStyle = "#000"; ctx.font = "32px " + font; ctx.textBaseline = "middle"; const subEl = root.querySelector('#f-sub-nazwa'); ctx.fillText(subEl ? subEl.innerText : '', x + 30, y + BAR_H + (SUB_H / 2) + 2); } ctx.restore(); } const curW = BAR_W * p; if (curW > 0) { ctx.save(); const mainGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(x, y, x + BAR_W, y); mainGrad.addColorStop(0, "#ffffff"); mainGrad.addColorStop(0.5, "#e0e0e0"); mainGrad.addColorStop(1, "#ffffff"); ctx.fillStyle = mainGrad; ctx.fillRect(x, y, curW, BAR_H); ctx.fillStyle = "#000"; ctx.globalAlpha = 0.1; ctx.fillRect(x, y + BAR_H - 4, curW, 4); ctx.restore(); } if (p > 0.4) { const tp = Math.min((progress - 0.4) * 2, 1); ctx.save(); ctx.globalAlpha = tp; ctx.fillStyle = "#000"; ctx.font = "bold 80px " + font; ctx.textBaseline = "middle"; const titEl = root.querySelector('#f-tytul-nazwa'); ctx.fillText(titEl ? titEl.innerText : '', x + 30, y + (BAR_H / 2)); ctx.restore(); } animationId = requestAnimationFrame(animate); } const radar = (root.parentElement || document.body).querySelector('#tag-spec-wrap'); const isRadarActive = radar && radar.closest('.template-wrapper').classList.contains('active'); if (isRadarActive) { setTimeout(() => { if (state === 'WAIT') state = 'IN'; }, 550); } else { state = 'IN'; } animate(); new MutationObserver(() => { if(!root.classList.contains('active')) state = 'OUT'; }).observe(root, {attributes:true}); })();

name: ZEGAR WIDGET
html: BTBINFO
css: .widget-container { position: absolute; left: 1620px; bottom: 115px; width: 190px; height: 170px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; background-color: #000000; gap: 6px; box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.5); transform: translateX(50px) translateY(20px) scale(0.9); opacity: 0; transition: all 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1); z-index: 100; box-sizing: border-box; } .active .widget-container { transform: translateX(0) translateY(0) scale(1); opacity: 1; } .clock-top { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex: 1; background: linear-gradient(-45deg, #f0f0f0, #ffffff, #c0c0c0); background-size: 200% 200%; animation: liveGrad1 4s ease infinite; } #current-time { font-family: 'Bahnschrift', sans-serif !important; font-size: 65px !important; font-weight: 400 !important; color: #000000 !important; letter-spacing: 0px; line-height: 1; } .info-bottom { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex: 1; background: #8b0000; } .info-text-wrapper { font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif !important; color: #ffffff; display: flex; align-items: center; } .btb-part { font-size: 38px; font-weight: bold; letter-spacing: 0px; } .info-part { font-size: 18px; font-weight: bold; margin-left: 6px; letter-spacing: 0px; } @keyframes liveGrad1 { 0% { background-position: 0% 50%; } 50% { background-position: 100% 50%; } 100% { background-position: 0% 50%; } }
js: (() => { const root = {{DOM_CONTEXT}}; const clockEl = root.querySelector('#current-time'); if(!clockEl) return; function updateClock() { const now = new Date(); const hours = String(now.getHours()).padStart(2, '0'); const minutes = String(now.getMinutes()).padStart(2, '0'); clockEl.textContent = hours + ':' + minutes; } updateClock(); const timerId = setInterval(() => { if (!document.contains(clockEl)) return clearInterval(timerId); updateClock(); }, 1000); })();
